cards.title: AI is helping revolutionise risk management | KPMG NZ
tldr: **KPMG NZ highlights how AI is revolutionizing risk management practices across various sectors.**
AI enhances capabilities for identifying, assessing, and mitigating complex risks more effectively.
This approach allows organizations to move from reactive to predictive risk strategies.

cards.title: Claude AI vs Claude Code vs Claude Cowork: Which Is the Right Tool for Your Workflow Automation?
tldr: **Claude AI, Claude Code, and Claude Cowork offer distinct features for workflow automation.**
Claude AI assists with repetitive tasks, while Claude Code focuses on coding efficiency.
Claude Cowork enhances collaboration, making it suitable for diverse work environments.

cards.title: How to use AI browsers to maximize your productivity
tldr: **AI browsers integrate generative AI features to significantly boost user productivity during web tasks.**
These browsers offer capabilities like instant summaries, content generation, and intelligent search within the browsing experience.
Utilizing AI browsers can streamline research, accelerate content creation, and improve information synthesis for professionals.

cards.title: 20 Best MCP Servers for Developers: Building Autonomous Agentic Workflows
tldr: **This guide identifies and categorizes 20 top Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers for developers.**

The aim is to transform temporary AI interactions into persistent, automated systems for production-grade AI deployment.

cards.title: Artificial Intelligence - ProjectManagement.com

This approach helps organizations navigate evolving AI regulations and maintain swift compliance, relevant to project governance and adherence.
